description: Exact id+content-hash allowlist for authoring-only Phaser Editor plugins (KTD-C, card comment 15 §10). Any plugin not listed here, or whose bytes differ, blocks (blocked-untrusted-plugin). Plugin source is additionally scanned for banned network/storage/eval APIs; GUI + proof sessions run loopback-only.

plugins.purpose: per-keystroke copy-field preview for a selected editable-copy semantic Text carrier only, coalesced to one undo per typing burst; fails closed on code-owned facts and unproven selection
read-only, network/storage/eval-free toggle panel surfacing full R9 metadata for every curated catalog entry from an embedded snapshot proven equal to catalog.json
